database.StreamingGraph

Package
Description
database
 
services
 

  • Uses of StreamingGraph in database

    Methods in database that return StreamingGraph
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    StreamingGraph
    StreamingDatabase.getGraph()
    Gets the streaming graph instance.

  • Uses of StreamingGraph in services

    Methods in services that return StreamingGraph
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractArtistContentSubgraph()
    Extracts a subgraph containing only Artists, Content items, and their participation relationships.
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractGenreSubgraph(String genreId)
    Extracts a subgraph containing only content of a given genre.
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractGenreUserSubgraph(String genreId)
    Extracts a subgraph containing only users, content of a given genre, and their watch/rate relationships.
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractRatingSubgraph(double minRating)
    Extracts a subgraph with rating relationships above a minimum threshold.
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractRegionSubgraph(String region)
    Extracts a subgraph containing only users of a given region and their watched/rated content.
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractUserArtistSubgraph()
    Extracts a subgraph containing Users, Artists, and their related Content items.
    StreamingGraph
    GraphService.extractUserUserSubgraph()
    Extracts a subgraph containing only Users and their follow relationships.
    Methods in services with parameters of type StreamingGraph
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    GraphService.isConnected(StreamingGraph subgraph)
    Checks if the graph or subgraph is connected (weak connectivity).
    Iterable<String>
    GraphService.shortestPathBetweenArtists(String fromArtistId, String toArtistId, StreamingGraph subgraph)
    Calculates the shortest path between two artists based on content they both participated in.
